retrieved_result: Add File Name and Path to Word 2007/2010 Documents Add File Name and Path to Word 2007/2010 Documents Posted on March 5, 2011 by Ronny Would you like to be able to insert the path and filename into a Word document while that document is in process, so the location is readily available?
